problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
hypothesis: Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus may resolve How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 18 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
